## Checklist

- [ ] Prose is plain and claims are backed up (no marketing language).
- [ ] Any performance figures are labelled as targets, not measurements.
- [ ] If a diagram changed, both the `.mmd` source and surrounding prose were
      updated.
- [ ] I've self-reviewed this diff.
